description.en: Use when a user wants to discard and remove a multi-sig proposal. All signatures must be removed first before a proposal can be discarded.
description.de: Verwenden, wenn ein Benutzer einen Multi-Sig-Vorschlag verwerfen und entfernen möchte. Alle Unterschriften müssen zuerst entfernt werden, bevor ein Vorschlag verworfen werden kann.
description.es: Use when a user wants to discard and remove a multi-sig proposal. All signatures must be removed first before a proposal can be discarded.
description.fr: Use when a user wants to discard and remove a multi-sig proposal. All signatures must be removed first before a proposal can be discarded.
description.ro: Use when a user wants to discard and remove a multi-sig proposal. All signatures must be removed first before a proposal can be discarded.
description.it: Use when a user wants to discard and remove a multi-sig proposal. All signatures must be removed first before a proposal can be discarded.

inputs.name: Action ID

description.en: The ID of the proposal to discard. All signatures must be removed first.
description.de: Die ID des zu verwerfenden Vorschlags. Alle Unterschriften müssen zuerst entfernt werden.
description.es: The ID of the proposal to discard. All signatures must be removed first.
description.fr: The ID of the proposal to discard. All signatures must be removed first.
description.ro: The ID of the proposal to discard. All signatures must be removed first.
description.it: The ID of the proposal to discard. All signatures must be removed first.

inputs.bot: If the user hasn't specified an action ID, first run 'Get Pending Actions' to show what's available.
